text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We're holding another concert to<n>draw support for
our project.

text_block_list.name: Light Hello
text_block_list.text:
So our mini concert today will be<n>something new
for all of us, but—

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Small or big, we give every concert<n>110%! Isn't
that right, Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Bourbon?

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text:
Calculating probability of achieving<n>today's
objective: "convey<n>gratitude"...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, no calculating!

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Oh?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Whether or not we achieved our goal<n>is for the
audience to decide, not us!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
We can ask them directly afterwards!<n>I bet they'll
all answer with a smile<n>on their face.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: ...Understood. Post-concert protocol<n>updated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The mini concert ends in success.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
How'd you like today's concert?<n>Have we made
you into an even<n>bigger fan?!

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, um, y-yeah.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: Falcon, enthusiasm overload. She's<n>shying away.

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... No, but I really did become a<n>fan.

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
I got to see a different side to you<n>than at the
races, and the emotions<n>you gave off felt...
different,<n>somehow.

text_block_list.name: Mihono Bourbon
text_block_list.text: My... emotions?

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
Yes, and now that I've gotten a<n>glimpse of them, I
want to feel them in<n>full.

text_block_list.name: Fan
text_block_list.text:
I've made up my mind to cheer for<n>you not just in
your races, but in your<n>concerts too.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Ah, I know! Why don't you try talking<n>directly with
a fan sometime?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Who knows, you might learn a thing<n>or two,
including what concerts mean<n>to you.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Will I really learn anything?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, Suzuka was so peak today... I<n>mean, she
always is. Wonder if she'll<n>be in the next concert
too.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Excuse me, may I have a moment?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, Suzuka?! A-am I<n>dreaming? Is it really
you?!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
S-sorry to startle you. I just wanted<n>to ask you
something.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Why does it make you happy? Me<n>being in a
concert, I mean.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text: Huh? Because I get to see you,<n>that's why!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: But you get to see me when I race<n>too, don't you?

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Well, that's true, but it's like... In<n>races, all I can do
is cheer you on.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text:
So I like being able to sing along with<n>you, being in
the same space, sharing<n>the same feelings.

text_block_list.name: Suzuka's Fan
text_block_list.text:
Concerts are where I can... welcome<n>you home, in
a way.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Welcome... home?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh? Oh, thanks!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
You caught me off guard. Didn't think<n>you'd be
back yet.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Spe?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ooh, that's an interesting talk you had<n>with a fan.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but... it strikes me as odd that a<n>concert
would be a place to say<n>"welcome home."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Wait, really?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I've said that exact thing before,<n>actually.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
See, when I'm racing you, what I see<n>is a back
that I need to catch up to.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But off the track—when I'm just<n>cheering—all I can
do is watch over<n>you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I remember seeing you off before a<n>race—I was a
nervous wreck. All I<n>could think was, "Be back
soon."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And, "Please, please, come home to<n>me safely."

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
So when the race ended, and the<n>stage lit up, I
was so happy that I<n>started waving my hands
frantically...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
The only words that came to mind<n>were "Welcome
home!" and "You did<n>great!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And also, "Let's have tons of fun<n>today!"

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... I guess "welcome home"<n>makes me
sound like I'm your mom<n>or something.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
When the concert starts, it's like<n>we've come
home together to the<n>same place.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Come... home?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ahaha... Sorry if none of this makes<n>any sense!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
No, that was helpful, thank you. I think<n>I'm starting
to understand.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...Now I want to know how it feels to<n>be welcomed
home.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Ah, Suzuka, perfect timing. Mind if I<n>ask your
opinion on something?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Air Groove? Sure, I don't mind...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
The student council is holding an<n>exhibition race,
and one of the<n>runners had to drop out. So, if
possible, I was thinking you could...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: ...Is something wrong?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
No, it's just that there'll be a concert<n>involved as
well, and you'll need to<n>learn new choreography.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
I doubt you'd object to another race,<n>but the
concert would be a pain, so<n>I'm prepared to hear
no for an<n>answer. But on the off chance that
you're willing...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Sounds fine to me. I'll learn the new
choreography.

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: You will?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Okay then, I'll register you right away.<n>Wait right
here!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Hehe... Okay.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
...I can already hear the voices<n>welcoming me
home.
